sections.instruction: Questions 1-4: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 5-7: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 8-10: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD for each answer.

questions.content: Leela’s friend who studied in China said
options: A the food was very different

questions.content: One problem people studying abroad have is
options: B feeling homesick and missing friends
C eating different kinds of food

questions.content: Corben says that when applying for a study abroad program
options: A Leela needs to get parental permission
B Leela needs to keep things organized
C Leela has to raise money

questions.content:
(8) Leela must make sure her classes abroad will {{BLANK}} towards her degree.
(9) The minimum grade point {{BLANK}} to study abroad is 3.2.
(10) After filling out the application Leela must {{BLANK}} them to the Office of Study Abroad.

sections.instruction: Questions 11-16: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 17-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: The food festival takes place
options: A at the beginning of April
B at the end of April
C in the middle of March

questions.content: The East Asian section will feature cuisine from
The Latin American section will have
Besides food tasting there will also be
options: C events that show people how to cook

questions.content: For a list of events, people can
options: B look them up on the internet

questions.content: The speaker highly recommends that participants
options: C register in advance for workshops

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: The continuing education program is for people who
options: A want to learn new hobbies
B want to start getting another degree

questions.content: The woman is interested in
options: A making money to travel the world

questions.content: The city centre is accessible by public transportation but
options: B does not offer as many classes

questions.content: The woman takes care of her ill father during
The man finally suggests taking classes
options: B at the city centre campus
C at the suburban satellite campus

questions.content: The class for returning students teaches time management techniques like
options: A how to organize and use one’s time efficiently
B how to talk to your teachers

questions.content: The class that reviews study skills goes over
According to the dialogue the woman can go online in order to
The price of online classes is
options: A the same as everything else
B cheaper than going to either campus
C more expensive than going to the city centre campus

questions.content: Textbooks and other course materials are
options: A free when taking the online course

sections.instruction: Questions 31 and 32: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD only for each answer. Questions 33-37: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Question 38: Choose TWO letters A-F. Questions 39 and 40: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Which TWO things concerning the dining facilities on campus did students complain about?
options: A inadequate number of dining facilities
D quality of food at existing places is low
F prices that are too expensive

questions.content: Why would a significantly minority of students not benefit from improved dining facilities?
options: A they always make their own food and do not use those facilities
B they live off campus and do not eat their meals at school
C they cannot afford to eat on campus and buy their food from other places

questions.content: What is one argument against improving the athletics building?
options: A it would change the make up of the student body population
B only a small proportion of students actually
C it would harm the reputation of the university
